records.content: Dieu 249 quy dinh toi tang tru trai phep chat ma tuy la hanh vi cat giu trai phep chat ma tuy ma khong nham muc dich mua ban, van chuyen hoac san xuat trai phep chat ma tuy. Khung co ban bi phat tu tu 01 nam den 05 nam khi thuoc cac truong hop luat dinh, bao gom mot so nguong khoi luong chat ma tuy hoac truong hop da bi xu phat, ket an ma con vi pham.

metadata.title: Toi tang tru trai phep chat ma tuy
metadata.source: Bo luat Hinh su 2015 sua doi 2017, Dieu 249

records.content: Ngoai hinh phat tu, nguoi pham toi tang tru trai phep chat ma tuy co the bi phat tien, cam dam nhiem chuc vu, cam hanh nghe hoac lam cong viec nhat dinh, hoac bi tich thu mot phan hay toan bo tai san theo quy dinh cua Bo luat Hinh su.

metadata.title: Hinh phat bo sung toi tang tru trai phep chat ma tuy
metadata.source: Bo luat Hinh su 2015 sua doi 2017, Dieu 249

records.content: Dieu 250 quy dinh toi van chuyen trai phep chat ma tuy. Khung co ban cua hanh vi van chuyen trai phep chat ma tuy bi phat tu tu 02 nam den 07 nam khi thoa man dau hieu cau thanh va cac nguong khoi luong theo quy dinh.

metadata.title: Toi van chuyen trai phep chat ma tuy
metadata.source: Bo luat Hinh su 2015 sua doi 2017, Dieu 250

records.content: Dieu 251 quy dinh toi mua ban trai phep chat ma tuy. Khung co ban cua hanh vi mua ban trai phep chat ma tuy bi phat tu tu 02 nam den 07 nam. Cac khung nang hon ap dung khi co tinh tiet tang nang, khoi luong lon, co to chuc, loi dung chuc vu hoac cac truong hop dac biet nghiem trong.

metadata.title: Toi mua ban trai phep chat ma tuy
metadata.source: Bo luat Hinh su 2015 sua doi 2017, Dieu 251

records.content: Doi voi toi mua ban trai phep chat ma tuy, cac khung hinh phat nang co the len den 15 nam, 20 nam, tu chung than hoac tu hinh tuy theo chat ma tuy, khoi luong, tinh tiet tang nang va muc do nguy hiem cua hanh vi.

metadata.title: Khung nang toi mua ban trai phep chat ma tuy
metadata.source: Bo luat Hinh su 2015 sua doi 2017, Dieu 251

records.content: Dieu 252 quy dinh toi chiem doat chat ma tuy. Hanh vi chiem doat chat ma tuy bi xu ly hinh su khi co du dau hieu cau thanh toi pham va co the bi ap dung cac khung hinh phat tang nang tuy theo khoi luong, tinh tiet va hau qua.

metadata.title: Toi chiem doat chat ma tuy
metadata.source: Bo luat Hinh su 2015 sua doi 2017, Dieu 252

records.content: Luat Phong, chong ma tuy 2021 nghiem cam cac hanh vi trong, san xuat, tang tru, van chuyen, mua ban, chiem doat, su dung trai phep chat ma tuy; to chuc su dung trai phep chat ma tuy; cuong buc, loi keo nguoi khac su dung trai phep chat ma tuy; va cac hanh vi khac lien quan trai phep den chat ma tuy, tien chat, thuoc gay nghien, thuoc huong than.

metadata.title: Cac hanh vi bi nghiem cam ve ma tuy

records.content: Luat Phong, chong ma tuy 2021 quy dinh cac hinh thuc cai nghien ma tuy gom cai nghien tu nguyen tai gia dinh, cai nghien tu nguyen tai cong dong, cai nghien tu nguyen tai co so cai nghien ma tuy va cai nghien bat buoc tai co so cai nghien ma tuy.

metadata.title: Hinh thuc cai nghien ma tuy
metadata.source: Luat Phong, chong ma tuy 2021, Chuong V

records.content: Gia dinh co trach nhiem giao duc thanh vien ve tac hai cua ma tuy, quan ly va ngan ngua thanh vien vi pham phap luat ve ma tuy, phoi hop voi co quan, to chuc trong quan ly nguoi su dung trai phep chat ma tuy va ho tro nguoi cai nghien ma tuy.

metadata.title: Trach nhiem cua gia dinh trong phong, chong ma tuy

records.content: Co quan, to chuc co trach nhiem tuyen truyen, giao duc, phat hien, ngan chan hanh vi vi pham phap luat ve ma tuy; phoi hop voi co quan chuc nang trong phong, chong ma tuy; va quan ly can bo, nguoi lao dong de phong ngua te nan ma tuy.

metadata.title: Trach nhiem cua co quan, to chuc trong phong, chong ma tuy

records.content: Nguoi su dung trai phep chat ma tuy co the bi quan ly theo quy dinh cua phap luat de phong ngua tai su dung, danh gia tinh trang nghien va ap dung bien phap ho tro, can thiep, cai nghien phu hop.

metadata.title: Quan ly nguoi su dung trai phep chat ma tuy

records.content: Nghi dinh 105/2021/ND-CP huong dan chi tiet mot so noi dung cua Luat Phong, chong ma tuy, trong do co quan ly nguoi su dung trai phep chat ma tuy, xac dinh tinh trang nghien ma tuy, ho so quan ly va trach nhiem phoi hop cua co quan co lien quan.

metadata.title: Huong dan thi hanh Luat Phong, chong ma tuy

records.content: Nghi dinh 57/2022/ND-CP quy dinh cac danh muc chat ma tuy va tien chat. Danh muc duoc dung lam can cu de quan ly, kiem soat chat ma tuy, tien chat va ap dung quy dinh phap luat trong phong, chong ma tuy.

metadata.title: Danh muc chat ma tuy va tien chat

records.content: Tien chat la hoa chat co the duoc su dung de san xuat trai phep chat ma tuy. Hoat dong san xuat, kinh doanh, xuat nhap khau, van chuyen va su dung tien chat phai duoc kiem soat theo quy dinh phap luat.

metadata.title: Kiem soat tien chat
metadata.source: Luat Phong, chong ma tuy 2021 va van ban huong dan

records.content: Khi dua tin ve nghe si hoac ca nhan lien quan den vu viec ma tuy, can phan biet thong tin dieu tra, thong tin khoi to, thong tin xet xu va ket luan cua toa an. Can tranh khang dinh mot nguoi co toi khi chua co ban an co hieu luc phap luat.

metadata.title: Nguyen tac dua tin ve vu viec lien quan den ma tuy
metadata.source: Tong hop tin tuc phap luat

records.content: Cac bai bao ve nghe si lien quan den ma tuy can duoc doi chieu voi nguon chinh thong nhu thong bao cua co quan cong an, vien kiem sat, toa an hoac van ban phap luat. Neu chi co tin don hoac bai dang mang xa hoi thi khong du can cu de ket luan.

metadata.title: Kiem chung nguon tin ve nghe si lien quan den ma tuy
metadata.source: Tong hop tin tuc phap luat
